query: SELECT p.section, p.contract_external_id, COUNT(p.id) as pay_cnt, COUNT(i.id) as inst_cnt FROM payment_transactions p LEFT JOIN installments i ON i.section = p.section AND i.contract_external_id = p.contract_external_id WHERE p.period_no IS NULL AND p.section = 'Fastfone365' GROUP BY p.section, p.contract_external_id LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT p.section, p.contract_external_id, COUNT(p.id) as pay_cnt, COUNT(i.id) as inst_cnt FROM payment_transactions p LEFT JOIN installments i ON i.section = p.section AND i.contract_external_id = p.contract_external_id WHERE p.period_no IS NULL AND p.section = 'Fastfone365' GROUP BY p.section, p.contract_external_id LIMIT 5;
